data.title: DOGE may hit $0.31 resistance for 29% gain by Nov 2025. Technicals show gradual recovery from $0.24.
data.description: Analysts predict that Dogecoin (DOGE) could potentially reach a resistance point at $0.31 in the next four weeks. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) remains neutral while the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator shows bullish momentum, indicating a steady climb from its current value of $0.24. This signifies a positive outlook for DOGE as it gradually rebounds in the coming weeks.

data.title: Supreme Court rejects Coinbase's bid, preserving Californians' right to seek public relief in court. Oct 9, 2025.
data.description: In San Francisco on October 9, 2025, the U.S. Supreme Court decided not to review Coinbase's appeal of a significant ruling won by BraunHagey & Borden LLP (BHB) in the Kramer v. Coinbase case. This ruling upheld Californians' rights to bring forth claims.

IRS RAISES 2026 TAX BRACKETS AND DEDUCTIONS The IRS announced new 2026 federal income tax brackets. The top 37% rate will apply to income above $640,600 for individuals and $768,700 for joint filers. The standard deduction rises to $32,200 for couples and $16,100 for singles.

data.title: Merit Network expands eduroam in Detroit for Digital Inclusion Week, Oct 6-10, 2025, advancing education with safe Wi-Fi. #DigitalInclusion
data.description: Detroit residents can benefit from an expansion of eduroam, the secure Wi-Fi network designed for education and research, as part of a community initiative launched by Merit Network during Digital Inclusion Week from October 6-10, 2025. The initiative aims to provide access to this global network in the city. Funding supports this project, showcasing a commitment to digital inclusion.

data.title: goHappy has launched automatic language translations for text messages, enhancing inclusivity for employees.
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia on October 9, 2025, goHappy, a prominent company specializing in cutting-edge frontline engagement tools, unveiled a new feature. This feature automatically translates text messages into the preferred language of each employee. By doing so, it removes the necessity for HR, Operations, or other departments to manage this task manually. This innovative solution aims to enhance communication and inclusivity within teams.

data.title: SIGNAL IDUNA to implement Gemini Enterprise from Google Cloud for 10,000+ employees, boosting productivity.
data.description: In Germany, in cities such as Dortmund and Hamburg, the insurance company SIGNAL IDUNA is making strides in the industry by introducing Gemini Enterprise from Google Cloud to over 10,000 of its employees and sales partners. This move aims to enhance productivity and enable the workforce to create personalized solutions.

data.title: Tilray (NASDAQ: TLRY) stock surges after Q1 2026 earnings reveal break-even vs consensus loss of 2 cents/share, $3.9M profit, $10.2M adjusted EBITDA, and $209.5M net revenue, up 5%.
data.description: Tilray Brands Inc. (NASDAQ: TLRY) saw a significant rise in stock value due to its latest financial results for the first quarter of 2026. Instead of an expected loss of 2 cents per share, the company reported breaking even. It also showcased a notable improvement in adjusted net income, jumping from an adjusted net loss of $(6.1) million to $3.9 million. Additionally, the adjusted EBITDA for the first quarter surged by 9% to $10.2 million, compared to $9.3 million the previous year. Net revenue for the quarter also showed growth, increasing by 5% to $209.5 million from the previous figure of $200.0 million.

data.title: Solana's price could surge by 9% to hit $240 in the next two weeks due to positive technical indicators and analyst predictions.
data.description: The price forecast for Solana suggests a possible increase of 9% to reach a target of $240 in the next 14 days. This prediction is backed by a positive moving average convergence trend and agreement among analysts.

data.title: Report by ResearchAndMarkets.com provides insights into AI data center technologies for 2025, essential for professionals.
data.description: A report titled "New Technologies for the AI Data Center: 2025 Guide" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. The report offers exclusive competitive intelligence on AI data center technology. Targeted towards professionals in various sectors including business, government, academia, and investment, this report aims to enhance product planning and marketing strategies. With 100 pages of in-depth analysis, it serves as a valuable resource for individuals seeking the most recent insights and analysis in this field.

data.title: CPSC announces product recalls on its website, including Calico Brands' Scripto Premium Torches. Visit www.cpsc.gov for details.
data.description: Today, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) released information about recalls in cooperation with various firms. Calico Brands is recalling Scripto Premium Torches due to the potential risk of injury or death caused by fires and burns. The recalls are available for viewing on www.cpsc.gov. This announcement highlights the importance of addressing safety concerns in products to protect consumers.

data.title: Spartan Capital's Q3 2025 report, by Gianpaolo Raffo, analyzes macroeconomic trends, equity indices, and sector movements.
data.description: Spartan Capital Securities, LLC has released its Q3 2025 Performance Overview and Technical Outlook report, authored by market strategist Gianpaolo Raffo. The publication offers a detailed analysis of macroeconomic conditions, equity indices, sector movements, and technical analysis for the third quarter of 2025. This comprehensive report provides valuable insights into market trends and performance during this period in New York, NY.

data.title: LoanGeek named 2025 Broker of the Year by National Private Lenders Association for outstanding leadership and industry impact. CEO, Christopher Pepe, expressed gratitude for the honor.
data.description: LoanGeek, a tech platform linking real estate investors with non-bank lending nationwide, was crowned Broker of the Year 2025 by the National Private Lenders Association at the NPLA conference in Scottsdale, Arizona. This accolade highlights outstanding broker leadership, client results, lender collaborations, and industry influence. Christopher Pepe, Co-Founder & CEO of LoanGeek expressed gratitude for the recognition.
